vibe: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Objective, rigid, functional enterprise look.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

headers.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border z-50 sticky top-0

layout_and_spacing.generous_padding: Cards and containers should use p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision and ensure breathing room.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary-hover font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-border text-text-primary hover:bg-background-tertiary font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-accent-blue text-white hover:bg-accent-blue-hover font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-text-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-border-focus focus:border-transparent transition-all

badges.success: bg-success/10 text-success border border-success/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.warning: bg-warning/10 text-warning border border-warning/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.danger: bg-danger/10 text-danger border border-danger/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

logos.description: Round sign for leut specialty coffee on building
A sign for gaia&co features a tree logo.

avatars.description: woman in white crew neck shirt smiling

backgrounds.description: low angle photography of gray building at daytime

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons as it matches the crisp, clean Swiss aesthetic. Size normally around 16px to 24px.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states. Buttons shift in background color, cards gently elevate (-translate-y-1) and gain shadow.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Forms and buttons MUST use focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-border-focus for accessibility.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use Tailwind's transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for smooth micro-interactions.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text contrast must meet minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette and typography defined in this document.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex elements (Tables, Dialogs, Selects) and customize them to fit the flat, high-contrast Swiss style (minimal border radii, stark borders).
Never center text universally; align left by default for dashboards and large forms to ensure scannability.
Ensure the dashboard utilizes the full width effectively with generous padding inside cards.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Keep Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds or buttons. Stick to solid colors to maintain the authoritative, functional Swiss feel.
